title: Liberation of Abridon
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Battle of Abridon}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Battle |prev=[[Mission to Trasse]]''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' |conc= |next=[[Battle of Sullust (4 ABY)|Battle of Sullust]] |image=[[File:Abridon_battle2.jpg]] |name=Liberation of Abridon |conflict=[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] |date=[[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] |place=[[Abridon/Legends|Abridon]] |result=Decisive Alliance victory, Abridon becomes member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] |side1=Alliance to Restore the Republic |side2=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=*[[General/Legends|General]] [[Tyr Taskeen]] *General [[Brenn Tantor]] |commanders2= |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*[[Rebel trooper/Legends|Rebel troopers]] [[Abridon Nationalists]] *[[Infiltrator (armor)|Infiltrators]] *[[Hover Transport TC9]]s *[[T1-B hovertank]]s *[[T3-B heavy attack tank]]s *[[Tracked Mobile Base]] *[[Scanner Jammer]]s *[[Swoop/Legends|Swoop Bikes]] *[[T-47 airspeeder/Legends|T-47 airspeeders]] *[[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighters]] |forces2=*[[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] *[[All Terrain Personal Transport/Legends|AT-PT walkers]] *[[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST walkers]] *[[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT walkers]] *[[All Terrain Anti Aircraft/Legends|AT-AA walkers]] *[[Imperial mobile artillery|Mobile artillery]] *[[74-Z speeder bike/Legends|74-Z speeder bikes]] *[[Probe droid/Legends|Probe droids]] *[[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=Light |casual2=Heavy |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|Sounds easy enough. What's the catch?''"
"''Sayan is under siege by the Empire. The Abridon Nationalists are pinned down within the city. The fighting has lasted for several months now and doesn't show any signs of subsiding. In an effort to squelch the opposition, the Empire has called in Heavy Artillery Platforms to level the city.''"
"''Oh. That's quite a catch.''"
"''Hopefully, the Force is with you, Brenn. You're going to need it on this one.|[[Brenn Tantor]] and [[Tyr Taskeen]]|}} The '''Third Battle of Abridon''' took place in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], right before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] supported the [[Abridon Nationalists]] in their effort to drive the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] off [[Abridon/Legends|Abridon]]. ==The battle== Several months before the battle, the Nationalists had [[Uprising on Abridon|revolted]] against the Empire with the Rebel Alliance's support. That uprising was [[Massacre on Abridon|put down]] by Imperial general [[Brenn Tantor]]. However, while the Rebel presence had been destroyed, the Nationalists continued to fight, holed up in the industrial center of [[Sayan]]. It was after months of fighting that the Nationalists appealed again to the Rebellion for aid, offering their allegiance and military supplies in exchange for driving the Empire off the planet. Shortly before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the Rebellion made the decision to relieve the planet. General [[Tyr Taskeen]], the man who had commanded the first Rebel army, returned with Tantor, who had defected to the Alliance after refusing an order from his superior to massacre civilians. Tantor's forces landed on the southern edge of the [[Abridon capital city|capital]]. Tantor quickly moved to defend his position by taking the Imperial base just to the east of his position. Tantor then moved north in to the city proper, seizing the Imperial base he himself had previously set up at the foot of [[Government Mound]]. With no more centralized Imperial positions in the vicinity, he retook the [[Abridon Government Center|Government Center]]. One Abridon in the Government Center revealed to Tantor that his family, along with many other citizens, were being held in a [[Abridon holding camp|camp]] outside the city. Tantor's troops swiftly found the holding center, from which they liberated several prisoners. One of them was [[Hamman Flatt]], former [[Lieutenant governor/Legends|lieutenant governor]] of Abridon and a Nationalist, whom Tantor had imprisoned on his last visit. Flatt offered a deal to the Rebels: he would lead Abridon into the Rebel fold and provide a shipment of [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wings]] if Tantor and Taskeen would drive the Empire off the planet and relieve the Nationalists in Sayan, where the Empire had begun leveling the city with artillery. [[File:Sayan_A-wings.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wings]] take off from the [[Abridon Shipyard]] to join the Rebel fleet over [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]].]] Tantor was inserted at the edge of Sayan. Using the city's running street battles as cover, he crept the [[Tracked Mobile Base|TR-MB]], a light escort of armor, and several [[Hover Transport TC9|Hover Transports]] filled with troopers and pilots for the A-wings to the [[Abridon Shipyard]], located on an island at the edge of the city. Capturing the shipyards and rushing the flight of A-wings into orbit, Tantor fortified his position, which was approachable only by two causeways. Calling down reinforcements from orbit, he smashed the Imperial presence in the city, completely cleansing it of enemies. Completely free of the Empire, Abridon joined the Rebellion. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GCW 4 ABY 1}} {{Interlang |de=Schlacht von Abridon (4 NSY) }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Abridon, liberation of}} [[Category:Battles of Abridon]] [[Category:Battles of the Galactic Civil War]]
